content.en:
The Supreme True Ancestor is so powerful that it is enough to compete with the weaker Pseudo-Dao Ancestor!

In other words, it is the realm of Dao Mountain, and the pseudo-Dao Ancestor is also the Dao Ancestor, and many Dao Ancestors are pseudo Dao Ancestors.

It's only been a long time since he reached this level, what an astonishing speed of improvement!

Of course, if it weren't for the Purple Lake of Black Wind Mountain, he wouldn't have been able to rise to the level of the Supreme True Ancestor so quickly.

At the same time, he also realized how powerful those Upper Triple Heaven forces were, and ordinary forces had no way to compete with the Upper Triple Heaven forces.

The Upper Triple Heaven Force could easily cultivate a top-tier True Ancestor, while it was difficult for an ordinary force to even give birth to a top-tier True Ancestor.

Moreover, almost all of the Upper Triple Heaven forces have Supreme True Ancestors, and there is more than one, and there is even an invincible True Ancestor in charge, which can easily sweep the True Ancestor level of ordinary forces.

"It's a pity that the effect of Purple Lake on me has been reduced too much, if such a treasure land can always increase my cultivation speed, how good it would be!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

But soon, he became indifferent again.

Although he didn't have the amplification effect of Purple Lake, he still had three ancient realm records, and he could still quickly improve the power of the True Ancestor.

"No, I don't just have three Ancient Realm records, but four Ancient Realm records!"

Not long ago, Ye Tian obtained the fourth Ancient Realm record-the strongest physique record!

Because at that time, his forbidden body was tempered to one percent, and the entry of the forbidden body can be regarded as condensing into the constitution of the forbidden body.

At present, among the True Ancestors, he is the only one who has a forbidden body, so he created this record, far surpassing other physiques, and thus obtained this record.

Unless someone also condenses the forbidden body and surpasses his forbidden body, they can break his record.

The records of the four ancient realms made Ye Tian's cultivation speed reach a terrifying speed.

Therefore, after leaving the Purple Lake, Ye Tian's cultivation speed would only be slower, not too slow.

Before leaving the Wind King Small Realm, Ye Tian used those points to exchange for another Dao technique.

Before, the Dao Technique that Ye Tian obtained and the Dao Technique he practiced were basically very ordinary Dao Techniques, and according to the division of the Divine Heaven Realm, they should belong to the Little Thousand Dao Techniques.

Most of the Dao Ancestors practiced the Small Thousand Dao Technique, but on top of the Small Thousand Dao Technique, there were also the Middle Thousand Dao Technique and the Great Thousand Dao Technique.

And the Great Thousand Dao Technique is still not the strongest Dao Technique, the strongest Dao Technique belongs to the strongest Dao Technique!

The strongest Dao technique is the ultimate Dao technique, and there is no invincible Dao technique!

But the Middle Thousand Dao Technique is almost the foundation of the Middle Triple Heaven Force, and it is almost impossible to spread it to the outside world, and the Lower Triple Heaven Force has almost no way to obtain the inheritance of the Middle Thousand Heaven Technique.

Black Wind Mountain has the inheritance of the Thousand Dao Technique, but Ye Tian can only accept the inheritance to learn and cultivate, but he is not allowed to pass it on.

Moreover, just for the inheritance of a Thousand Dao Technique, he needed to pay 50,000 points, and many True Ancestors simply could not afford to pay for the inheritance of the Thousand Dao Technique.

But Ye Tian doesn't care about points, he only cares about his own strength.

Normally, a True Ancestor would not be able to practice the Middle Thousand Dao Technique, but a True Ancestor with Dao-level natal talent would be able to practice the Middle Thousand Dao Technique.

The Thousand Dao Technique that Ye Tian selected for himself is called the Great Wilderness Law Body!

This is a Zhongqian Dao technique that has both defense and combat power amplification, which is very suitable for Ye Tian, and he happens to have the defensive Dao-level natal talent of Desolate Emperor.

Therefore, he could practice any Dao technique that involved defense.

Back to the Terrans.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Great Wilderness Law Body, striving to successfully cultivate this Thousand Dao Technique as soon as possible, at that time, his life-saving ability will be stronger, and his combat effectiveness will be stronger, at least he will not be the bottom of the strongest Dao Ancestors.

Meanwhile.

The Liuli Sect had finally completed its investigation of the Void Heaven Temple, and had also figured out the general truth about the fall of the three top True Ancestors.

The main hall of the Liuli Sect.

Xuanling True Ancestor angrily pointed at Xuangang True Ancestor and said, "Waste, you didn't even investigate the strength of the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestors, so you sent three top True Ancestors to assassinate him, and as a result, the three top True Ancestors fell! He has the records of the three great ancient realms, can it be a simple true ancestor? No, he now has the records of the four great ancient realms, and not long ago, he once again obtained a record of the strongest physique!"

Xuangang True Ancestor was scolded and couldn't fight back, but he wanted to say in his heart: Didn't you also investigate the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor?

Of course, this can't be said, who made his strength and status inferior to Xuanling True Ancestor!

The Xuanling True Ancestor was the only one of the strongest True Ancestors in the Liuli Sect, and he was only the top True Ancestor.

"Xuanling True Ancestor, Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor has the four ancient realms to record an increase in cultivation speed, which is a huge threat, with his talent, I am afraid that he will soon be able to ascend to the Supreme True Ancestor!"

Xuangang True Ancestor reminded.

"He wants to become the strongest true ancestor, how can it be so easy! Judging from the results of our investigation, he also fought with the three great true ancestors of our Liuli Sect for a long time before killing them, and maybe he was even injured. Therefore, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor should belong to the good combat power among the top True Ancestors. It's just that he has the strongest physique and the strongest True Ancestor power, so it's hard to kill. No matter how demonic Tianjiao is, it is not difficult to become a top true ancestor, but if you want to become a supreme true ancestor, it must be a long time, or a great opportunity to have hope! How long has it been, how can a Ten Thousand Fa True Ancestor become a supreme true ancestor! But one thing you are not mistaken, he has four great ancient realm records, and he is definitely a huge threat!"

"This time, I'm ready to do it myself!"

Xuanling True Ancestor Dao.

"What, Xuanling True Ancestor, you want to do it yourself?"

Xuangang True Ancestor was shocked.

Xuanling True Ancestor personally took action, what does he represent, it means that the Liuli Sect is afraid that it is going to fully invade the Void Heaven True Country.

In this way, I am afraid that the loss of the Liuli Sect will be very large!

"This is the order of the Dao Ancestors!" Xuan Ling True Ancestor said: "The Dao Ancestors already know about the existence of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, and they also feel that people like the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor are too dangerous. Moreover, killing the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is also of great benefit to us, he should be the son of luck in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, once we kill such a son of luck, we can deprive some of our luck, and our Liuli Sect can even rise. Moreover, we still have the boundary stone, and we are even expected to ascend to the ranks of the Triple Heaven forces! When the time comes, wouldn't it be nice for us to overlook those weak forces!"

"Then when will you invade the Void Heaven True Country?" Xuangang True Ancestor was a little expectant.

He didn't worry about his safety, after all, he was the best among the top True Ancestors, not to mention that there was also the Supreme True Ancestor Xuanling True Ancestor taking the lead, and the Void Heaven Hall only had four top True Ancestors.

So.

No matter how tragic the battle is, the Liuli Sect is not afraid at all!

"When the True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple arrive, although the Dark God Temple was hunted down and killed by the Void Heaven One Vein, their True Ancestors are even more numerous than us. Even if most of these True Ancestors are ordinary True Ancestors and elite True Ancestors, there are not many top-level True Ancestors, but they are also a powerful force, and with the True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple, we can definitely take down the Void Heaven True Realm at the lowest cost!" Xuan Ling True Ancestor said confidently.

Immediately, they began to ask the Fire Cloud True Ancestor to contact the True Ancestor of the Dark Temple.

For this plan, the Dark Temple also agreed, although it may be very disastrous, but as long as the Void Heaven True Kingdom is destroyed, they don't care.

Soon, the Dark God Temple began to mobilize a large number of True Ancestors, and almost eighty percent of the True Ancestors were mobilized over, and the Dark God Temple Hall Master personally transported them.

Although the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had been squatting outside the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he was unable to monitor everything around him at all times, so he was found by the Dark God Hall Master and sent a large number of True Ancestors into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm in an instant.

Subsequently, the Dark God Temple Master used a secret treasure to flee in an instant when the Void Heaven True Ancestor attacked, and disappeared.

At this time, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also conveyed a message that a large number of True Ancestors from the Dark God Temple had descended on the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and I was afraid that they would have to deal with the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

All of a sudden, all the True Ancestors of the entire Void Heaven True Kingdom came out of the retreat and began to prepare for war.

Ye Tian also ended his retreat, he knew very well that this time the enemy was probably not only the Dark Temple, but the Dark Temple alone would not dare to fight with the Void Heaven True Kingdom so desperately, and it must be the support of the Liuli Sect behind it.

In other words, the Liuli Sect and the Dark God Temple attacked together.

In the face of such a powerful enemy, the Void Heaven True Kingdom may be destroyed if it is not careful.

At the first time, the Void Heaven True Kingdom chose to ask for help from some True Countries with better relations, but it was quickly refused.

Those True Kingdoms had already been warned by the Liuli Sect, if there were forces that dared to support the Void Heaven True Kingdom, it would be to offend the Liuli Sect, and few forces dared to be enemies of the Five Heavens forces.

Besides, if you really ask for help, how many true ancestors will die, which force will be willing to do it?

All of a sudden, the Void Heaven True Kingdom fell into a crisis.
